arts.ttl: Man City's Etihad Stadium RENAMED ahead of Premier League fixture this weekend
arts.sum: The Etihad Stadium is being renamed as part of Manchester City's annual club charity weekend, and supporters will notice the temporary change when they host Brighton and Hove Albion

arts.ttl: Manchester City star admits to his own “mistakes” this season – Victims of their own success
arts.sum: Ilkay Gündogan has admitted he’s made “mistakes” this season but believes Manchester City have been a victim of their own success rather than falling off. Sport.de have an interview with the midfielder today in which he pinpoints where he thinks Manchester City have gone wrong this season. arts.ttl: 'His value is crucial' - Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler on Welbeck’s Thomas Tuchel England Snub
arts.sum: Before Brighton face Man City in the Premier Leauge, Hurzeler has praised Danny Welbeck’s vital role at the Albion despite missing out on England’s latest squad.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Brighton & Hove Albion injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Brighton: Joao Pedro looking to break Premier League scoring record, equal Richarlison feat
arts.sum: Joao Pedro will be looking to break a new Premier League record for Brighton & Hove Albion when they travel to the Etihad Stadium to face Manchester City on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Cheltenham Gold Cup Rich List 2025: Here are the 15 richest race horse owners – including 100-1 Brighton owner Tony Bloom and ex-Man United boss
arts.sum: The richest racehorse owners have been revealed

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Brighton: Pep Guardiola at risk of setting unwanted personal record in Premier League clash
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is at risk of setting an unwanted personal record when Manchester City welcome Brighton & Hove Albion to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola replies to Fabio Capello's 'tremendous damage to football' accusation
arts.sum: Ex-England boss Fabio Capello and Pep Guardiola have been drawn into a bitter war of words over recent days and the Manchester City head coach has sent a reply

arts.ttl: Watch the reaction to Fabian Hurzeler's 'good advice' after Brighton man had Pep Guardiola fuming
arts.sum: Reaction from Fabian Hurzeler’s press conference before Brighton travel to Manchester City for a Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Pep laughs off Capello calling him 'arrogant'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has laughed off criticism from Fabio Capello after the former England manager accused the Manchester City boss of ruining Italian football.
